roadmap.summary: Add zero-mutant-no-report branch to xtask mutants wrapper so empty filter intersections (cargo-mutants exits 0 without writing outcomes.json) become vacuous passes instead of crashes.

validation.reason: Bug-fix scope. RCA is the design SSOT; structure is deterministic (RED test + GREEN fix). No DESIGN/DISTILL waves; no architect dispatch needed.

exclusions.phase_3_refactor: Skip L1-L4 refactor pass — bug fix is intentionally minimal per project convention.
exclusions.phase_5_mutation: Skip mutation testing — xtask is excluded from cargo-mutants per project CLAUDE.md and dev memory.

steps.name: RED: regression test for absent outcomes.json + exit 0 path
steps.description: Add a unit test inside xtask::mutants::tests that drives the absent-file + clean-exit path and observes the wrapper crash. The test will FAIL on current main because read_outcomes_or_short_circuit does not yet exist (compile-fail is the RED signal). This commit may use --no-verify per .claude/rules/testing.md § 'RED scaffolds and intentionally-failing commits'.
criteria: A test named read_outcomes_returns_none_when_file_absent_and_exit_zero exists in mod tests in xtask/src/mutants.rs.

The test exercises a function read_outcomes_or_short_circuit(path, ExitStatus) -> Result<Option<RawReport>>; on RED commit this fails to compile (function does not yet exist) — that IS the regression signal.
implementation_notes: Existing test fixture conventions live in mod tests at xtask/src/mutants.rs:897.
Use tempfile::tempdir for a non-existent outcomes.json path.
Use Command::new("true").status() for ExitStatus::success() and Command::new("false").status() for non-zero.
tempfile is already a workspace dev-dep; verify before reaching for it.

steps.name: GREEN: introduce zero-mutant-no-report branch
steps.description: Per RCA changes 1.1–1.4 in docs/feature/fix-xtask-mutants-zero-mutant-crash/rca.md (lines 199–402): capture the ExitStatus returned by invoke_cargo_mutants (already typed Result<ExitStatus> at xtask/src/mutants.rs:208); add fn read_outcomes_or_short_circuit(&Path, ExitStatus) -> Result<Option<RawReport>>; add fn finalise_zero_mutant_run(&Path, &Mode) -> Result<()>; route run() at xtask/src/mutants.rs:138-148 through both helpers; add the four unit tests from RCA § 'Change 1.4'. After GREEN, the regression test from 01-01 passes and the original repro (cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --package xtask --file xtask/src/dst_lint.rs) no longer crashes — emits 'mutants: PASS' and writes target/xtask/mutants-summary.json with status=pass.
criteria: cargo nextest run -p xtask --lib passes including the four new tests.
cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings passes (or matches project default).
Manual repro: cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --package xtask --file xtask/src/dst_lint.rs prints PASS, exits 0, writes target/xtask/mutants-summary.json with status="pass" total_mutants=0.
The kill-rate gate is NOT weakened: no change to evaluate_diff_gate / evaluate_workspace_gate — synthetic RawReport routes through existing total_mutants==0 → Pass branch.
Crash-detection preserved: absent file + non-zero exit still bails with 'subprocess likely crashed'.
implementation_notes: RCA contains exact before/after snippets at lines 207–402.
kill_rate_percent at xtask/src/mutants.rs:590 already returns 100.0 for caught+missed==0, which is what the synthetic report needs.
DO NOT add prose comments beyond what RCA specifies. Bug-fix discipline: no scope creep, no opportunistic refactoring.
